title: Malaxis scottii
taxonomy: Malaxis scottii is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Malaxis and is a terrestrial orchid. Malaxis scottii is native to North America and is a relatively rare species. The classification of Malaxis scottii is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its small white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. Malaxis scottii is a member of the subtribe Malaxidinae within the orchid family.
